title: Stunt Jump #31
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #31

Use a broken concrete ramp to jump west across Buccaneer Way. Stop as soon as you land so you don't die running into barriers and other objects. **Preferred Vehicle:** Fast Car / Fully Tuned Bike

title: Stunt Jump #41
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #41

Jump from the black and white ramp and land in the small parking lot. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Sports Car

title: Stunt Jump #42
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #42

Jump the sign that looks like an upwards bending piece of road. It's an advertisement for an airline. You'll launch off the ramp and land on top of a multi-story car park. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Sports Car

title: Stunt Jump #11
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #11

Try to land in the intersection of the streets below without hitting a tree or any traffic. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

title: Stunt Jump #9
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #9

Jump off the Freeway and don't hit any vehicles. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike or Sports Car.

title: Stunt Jump #15
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #15

Jump from the ramp in the pagoda at the intersection of Vespucci Boulevard and Decker Street and land on Rockford Drive. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

title: Stunt Jump #34
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #34

Use trailer ramp to jump across the canal. Stop as soon as you land so you don't run into the trailers or building. **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

title: Stunt Jump #27
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #27

Use the construction dump ramp next to the guard post to jump over the LSI runway fencing. Be ready for a 3-star wanted level if you haven't purchased a hangar. **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

title: Stunt Jump #19
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #19

Jump from the sand dune in the construction site to the alley. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

title: Stunt Jump #5
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #5

Use the rock ramp to jump over the ravine. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

title: Stunt Jump #29
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #29

Jump from the sand dune to the landing strip. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

title: Stunt Jump #3
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #3

Use the flat rock as a ramp and land on the dirt road. (Works both ways). - **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

title: Stunt Jump #12
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #12

Jump from the house driveway to lighthouse on the island. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Anything you're not too fond of. You'll probably lose it.

title: Stunt Jump #23
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #23

Jump from the ramp on Panorama Drive and land in (or near) an empty pool on the west side of the Motel.

title: Stunt Jump #13
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #13

Start the jump off the Senora Freeway and land and over the prison fences - gather lots of speed. **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike Note: You will get a 3-star wanted rating.

title: Stunt Jump #1
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #1

Dirt ramp over road (land on the ditch to complete it successfully). - **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

title: Stunt Jump #2
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #2

On the highway overpass. Jump from the northern off ramp to the southern off ramp, while heading south.

title: Stunt Jump #4
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #4

Jump across the broken bridge. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

title: Stunt Jump #6
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #6

Gather speed and land on Power Street. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

title: Stunt Jump #7
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #7

Jump from the roof of the parking garage, using the beer sign as a ramp. Land near Alta Street.

title: Stunt Jump #8
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #8

Jump from the broken railing on Alta Street and land on La Puerta. **Preferred Vehicle:** Motorbike

title: Stunt Jump #10
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #10

Jump from Occupation Avenue and land on San Vitus Boulevard without hitting anything.

title: Stunt Jump #14
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #14

Jump off the broken stairwell from Elgin Avenue to Strawberry Avenue. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

title: Stunt Jump #16
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #16

Use the green stunt ramp in the Get Aweigh boat lot to jump onto the Olympic Freeway.

title: Stunt Jump #17
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #17

Use the wooden ramp on a garage's rooftop to jump over the impound lot, landing on Innocence Boulevard.

title: Stunt Jump #18
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #18

Jump from the rail on the edge of the overpass and land on San Andreas Avenue. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

title: Stunt Jump #20
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #20

Jump from the ramp onto the dirt or Freeway below the overpass. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

title: Stunt Jump #21
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #21

Jump the broken bridge over the water. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Any (even golf cart). **Note:** Start from the west side or it won't count.

title: Stunt Jump #22
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #22

Use a broken concrete ramp to jump over the outlet of the LS Storm Drain.

title: Stunt Jump #24
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #24

Jump from the ramp on the right side of the road and land on the **flood control drain.** - **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

title: Stunt Jump #25
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #25

Use Southeast corner wooden ramp on rooftop of the parking garage to jump over the storage warehouse, landing on Capital Boulevard.

title: Stunt Jump #26
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #26

Jump from the ramp between the roads and keep a left angle to land on the opposite side of the Freeway. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

title: Stunt Jump #28
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #28

Jump from the multi-floor garage and land at the gas station below. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

title: Stunt Jump #30
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #30

Jump over the narrow canal. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

title: Stunt Jump #32
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #32

Jump from the end of the road and land on Senora Highway. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Sports Car

title: Stunt Jump #33
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #33

Use gravel mound to jump East across Buccaneer Way. Stop as soon as you land so you don't die running into barriers and other objects. **Preferred Vehicle:** Fast Car / Fully Tuned Bike

title: Stunt Jump #35
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #35

Use trailer ramp to jump onto the roof of the warehouse. Don't take the ramp too fast and be careful of A/C units and vents on the roof when landing. **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

title: Stunt Jump #36
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #36

Use trailer ramp to jump onto the roof of the warehouse. Take the ramp as fast as possible or you will slam into the side of the building. *NOTE: This can be a glitchy jump and not always mark as completed, even when you land on the roof cleanly. Keep trying until you get the completion notice.* **Preferred Vehicle:** Fast Car / Fully Tuned Bike

title: Stunt Jump #37
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #37

Use trailer ramp to jump onto the La Puerta/Elysian Fields Freeway ramp. Take the trailer ramp as fast as possible or you won't clear the side of the freeway. When using a bike, stop quick after landing so you don't die in traffic. *NOTE: The wheels MUST touch the asphalt first - the freeway side barriers don't count.* - **Preferred Vehicle:** Fast Car / Fully Tuned Bike

title: Stunt Jump #38
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #38

Use trailer ramp to jump onto the roof of the warehouse. Don't take the ramp to fast and be careful of A/C units and vents on the roof when landing. *NOTE: Clear the construction cones in front of the ramp before attempting jump.* **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

title: Stunt Jump #39
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #39

Use ramp on East side of building to jump NorthWest over the building. You only have to clear the building and land on the road on the other side of the building. Don't go too fast on this jump. **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

title: Stunt Jump #40
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #40

Use ramp between railroad tracks (to the North) and La Puerta/Elysian Fields freeway (to the South) to jump across the canal. **Preferred Vehicle:** Fast Car / Fully Tuned Bike

title: Stunt Jump #43
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #43

Go through the canal, jump over the railway and land on the helipad area. - Preferred Vehicle: Bike / Sports Car

title: Stunt Jump #44
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #44

Jump from the ramp and land on the west side of Palomino Avenue. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

title: Stunt Jump #45
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #45

Jump from the metal sheet on the gravel pile at the bottom of the off-ramp and land on the other side of the junction. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

title: Stunt Jump #46
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #46

Use the ramp on the south side of the highway to jump eastbound traffic. Don't use too much speed or you will hit the underside of the overpass.

title: Stunt Jump #47
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #47

Jump through the center of the building

title: Stunt Jump #48
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #48

Jump over the entire parking lot and land on the sidewalk. - **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

title: Stunt Jump #49
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #49

Jump from the metal sheet ramp to the level below. **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

title: Stunt Jump #50
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump #50

Use dirt mound next to the Southern edge of Chum Street ramp and in front of some shipping containers to jump onto Chum Street water overpass. **Preferred Vehicle:** Any
